name: Ravi Concrete Figurine  – Series 01
desc: Meet Ravi. A little concrete creature standing 4 inches tall and 3 inches wide, hand cast and full of character. No two are exactly alike because concrete does what it wants. Air bubbles, texture shifts, tiny imperfections, that's the charm. Sometimes I throw dye into the mix, so there's always a chance yours shows up in a color way you won't see again. Collect one, collect a few. They all have their own personality.
